v: [7:1] How beautiful are thy feet with shoes, O prince’s daughter! the joints of thy thighs are like jewels, the work of the hands of a cunning workman. [7:5] Thine head upon thee is like Carmel, and the hair of thine head like purple; the king is held in the galleries.
